reference_report:
检查所见：
肝脏表面光滑，左右叶比例协调，肝裂不宽，肝实质密度均匀，未见局限性异常密度影。肝内外胆管未见明显扩张。胆囊不大，胆囊壁未见明显增厚，囊内未见异常密度影。胰腺形态尚可，胰腺钩突部周围脂肪间隙稍模糊、可见少许絮状影。脾脏、双肾上腺及所示双肾形态及密度未见异常。胃腔未见充盈，胃壁未见明显增厚。所示肠管未见梗阻及肿块征象。腹膜后及腹腔未见明显肿大淋巴结。骨质未见破坏。
诊断印象:
胰腺钩突部周围脂肪间隙稍模糊、可见渗出影，考虑急性胰腺炎。请结合临床。

candidate_reports.report_text: liver: liver and biliary tree: the liver is normal in size. there are scattered subcentimeter hypodensities throughout both lobes of the liver, which likely represent cysts or hamartomas (series 4/image 102). no intrahepatic or extra hepatic ductal dilatation. kidneys: kidneys and ureters: there is a 1.2 cm hypodense lesion in the interpolar region of the right kidney (series 4, image 90) which demonstrates peripheral nodular enhancement on delayed phase imaging consistent with an angiomyolipoma. no hydronephrosis or nephroureterolithiasis. spleen: spleen: normal.
